description: Letter addressed to Moshe b. Yehuda. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Last quarter of the 15th century. Dealing with various business matters, mainly raisins.  Mentions Ibrāhīm Shuwaykh and Ṣedaqa Nes. On verso there are jotted accounts, mentioning camphor, jasmine, raisins, chickpeas, and mulūkhiyya.
